tasks.subject: Task 1: Add audit-sarif recipes to backend & mobile justfiles
tasks.description:
Add `audit-sarif` recipes emitting SARIF (govulncheck+gosec backend, osv-scanner mobile), exit 0, existing recipes unchanged; add .gitignore *.sarif.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/justfile", "mobile/justfile", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just audit-sarif && python3 -c \"import json;json.load(open('govulncheck.sarif'));json.load(open('gosec.sarif'))\"", "spec": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-code-scanning-sarif-design.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire SARIF upload into PR/push jobs (backend.yml, mobile.yml)
tasks.description:
Add security-events:write; produce SARIF -> upload (categories, pinned codeql SHA 84498526a009a99c875e83ef4821a8ba52de7c22, fork guard) -> gate. sarif_file workspace-root-relative.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/backend.yml", ".github/workflows/mobile.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml;yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/backend.yml'));yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/mobile.yml'))\"", "spec": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-code-scanning-sarif-design.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire SARIF into security.yml (secrets + scheduled audits)
tasks.description:
All three security.yml jobs: security-events:write; betterleaks SARIF (--exit-code 0) + scheduled just audit-sarif -> upload (pinned SHA, fork guard) -> gate.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/security.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml;yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/security.yml'))\" && betterleaks git --no-banner --report-format sarif --report-path /tmp/bl.sarif --exit-code 0", "spec": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-code-scanning-sarif-design.md"}
```
